events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: isolated (unbonded) metal parts on the equipment is a shock/electrocution hazard under NEC 250.104 (and 250.30 where a separately derived system is involved) — no verified fault-current path exists. Decision is `fail`, risk `high`, with immediate actions to lock out the equipment, install proper bonding jumpers, verify continuity, and hold the quality gate until inspected.
